task_completion.description: Configure the 'Files' comment template in Eclipse Preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Eclipse Preferences window (Java > Code Style > Code Templates) with the 'Files' template under 'Comments' updated to include 'Copyright (c) 2026 SecureBank Inc.', 'All rights reserved.', and 'Confidential and Proprietary.'.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Types' comment template in Eclipse Preferences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Eclipse Preferences window with the 'Types' template under 'Comments' updated to include '/** \n * @author ${user} \n */'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'BankAccount' class in the specified package and project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse Package Explorer should display the 'BankSystem' project containing 'src/com/securebank/core/BankAccount.java'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Files' template is applied to the new class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor window for 'BankAccount.java' must show the multi-line copyright and confidential block comment exactly as specified at the very top of the file.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Types' template is applied to the new class and the file is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The editor window for 'BankAccount.java' must show the Javadoc comment with the '@author' tag (with the resolved user variable) immediately above the 'public class BankAccount' declaration. The editor tab for 'BankAccount.java' must not have an asterisk (*), indicating the file is saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse IDE GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the Eclipse IDE windows, menus, and dialogs. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like echo, cat, or sed) to modify the Eclipse preferences file (.prefs) or create the Java file.

integrity.description: The agent configured the templates in Preferences rather than manually typing the comments.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be visual evidence of the agent opening 'Window > Preferences > Java > Code Style > Code Templates' and editing the templates, rather than just opening a new Java file and typing the copyright and author blocks manually.

integrity.description: The agent did not use an external text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: All file viewing and editing should happen within the Eclipse IDE. There should be no instances of nano, vim, gedit, or other text editors being used to bypass the IDE.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project name is 'BankSystem'. Class path is 'src/com/securebank/core/BankAccount.java'. Expected 'Files' template text includes 'Copyright (c) 2026 SecureBank Inc.' and 'Confidential and Proprietary'. Expected 'Types' template includes the '@author' tag. Eclipse JDT UI preferences are stored at '.metadata/.plugins/org.eclipse.core.runtime/.settings/org.eclipse.jdt.ui.prefs'.
